T2_ridge_angle.description: Angle between leading Fisher eigenvector v₁(f) and posterior displacement direction vd
T2_ridge_angle.coordinate_system: [ln Mc, q, chi_eff, Lt/100, ln DL]
T2_ridge_angle.interpretation: v₁ and vd are in orthogonal parameter dimensions (ln Mc vs Λ̃/100) → α≈90° at all frequencies. This geometrically explains T3 failure: the test compares alignment against a displacement that lives in a different subspace.

T9_f_star.description: Broken power-law transition frequency for C(f)
T9_f_star.method: log-log slope crossing 1.0 (transition from steep to flat)
T9_f_star.interpretation: Below ~125 Hz, C(f) grows steeply as new Fisher information accumulates. Above ~125 Hz, growth saturates as the Fisher matrix stabilizes.

T9_N_500.description: Number of statistically significant eigenmodes at 500 Hz
T9_N_500.interpretation: At 0.1% threshold (standard convention), N=2 because λ₂/λ₁=0.16%. At stricter 1% threshold, N=1. Fisher matrix is effectively rank-1 or rank-2.

C_growth_22_500.note: Two values differ due to interpolation between stored frequency bins. Manifest uses 18 cut frequencies; C array has denser sampling.
